_comment: WalkPlay mic gain test capture — EPZ TP13 AI ENC audio (vendorId=0x3302 productId=0x13D4). Mic gain uses 16-bit signed encoding scaled by 32767/15 per dB (range -15..+15). readMicGain sends [0x80,0x02,0x00], response data[2]=LSB data[3]=MSB. setMicGain sends [0x01,0x02,0x02,LSB,MSB] fire-and-forget.

exchanges.description: setMicGain(-10 dB): r=-21845 → t=43691=0xAAAB → LSB=0xAB=171, MSB=0xAA=170
